title: Love Birds
writer: Clarence Marks, Dale Van Every, Doris Anderson
actors: Zasu Pitts, Slim Summerville, Mickey Rooney
plot: Love Birds is a 1934 American Pre-Code comedy film directed by William A. Seiter and written by Doris Anderson, Henry Myers and Tom Reed. The film stars Slim Summerville, ZaSu Pitts, Mickey Rooney, Frederick Burton, Emmett Vogan, ...
